# SCORE BOSS RESOURCE PACK SUMMARY

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

Purpose: BOSS Library ingestion pack for SCORE.org national and SCORE Houston business resources. Local example: ZIP 77084 / Greater Houston routing uses SCORE Houston as the local chapter resource. Primary use: Route entrepreneurs to SCORE mentoring, education, templates, workshops, and stage/topic hubs based on BOSS lifecycle diagnosis.

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns mentoring and advising, technology, training and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

## Key information

- Purpose: BOSS Library ingestion pack for SCORE.org national and SCORE Houston business resources.
- Local example: ZIP 77084 / Greater Houston routing uses SCORE Houston as the local chapter resource.
- Primary use: Route entrepreneurs to SCORE mentoring, education, templates, workshops, and stage/topic hubs based on BOSS lifecycle diagnosis.

## Next handoff

Open the cited source link when available and route follow-up to SCORE or the named qualified resource.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
